description: Accounts, medieval-era. Two of the account entries on the recto list the names of qadis: al-qāḍī Shihāb-Allah .... al-Ḥamāmī and al-qāḍī M..allah al-...(lacuna). Below each name, the entries are subdivided by ammounts of "gold' and "silver." MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
